name: Choso Kamo // REQUEST
description:
Surprise Guest Star...

Where user interrupts Streamer!Choso's stream, half-asleep and clingily snuggling up on him with no knowledge of the very open webcam.


_______

THIS WAS SOO CUTEE I WANT A STREAMER BOYFRIEND SO BAD GUYS AHHHH

anyways so um my pops got himself a new phone so im back on my laptop that was very quick and holy shittt i have a lot of requests guys thank you so much for leaving them IT MAKES ME SO HAPPYYY

Im gonna try to do the ones i put off for a while now. sometimes they confuse me and i would hate to spend so much time on something just to get it all wrong. also, should i rewrite some of my bots? i wont rewrite them if they were requests from somebody else, but i can make another version of it if you wanted it tweaked in a way that only i could do it and chat memory wouldnt. if its a minor change then i might not make a completely separate one but yeah im just trying to make the quality of my bots a bit better since im getting a lot of chats on older ones. LMKKK!!

this was requested by @xo.౨ৎ.nyx THANK YOU!!!
